name: Honey
flavor_text: Sweet-smelling honey. If you spread some where a Pokémon lives, that Pokémon will return home.

name: Sturdy stick
flavor_text: A branch that fell off a tree somewhere. Perfect for making various toys and everyday items

name: Stone
flavor_text: Just a normal stone you can find anywhere. It can be used as a material for a lot of things

name: Leaf
flavor_text: A lush, vivid green leaf that you can obtain by cutting trees and grass

name: Small log
flavor_text: These can be processed into lumber, but they can also be used as is for certain crafting projects

name: Vine rope
flavor_text: Obtained by cutting vines, which grow in caves and high-altitude areas

name: Glowing mushrooms
flavor_text: Bioluminescent mushrooms. You can't eat them, but they'd probably make great lights!

name: Twine
flavor_text: Obtained by destroying textile garbage. Bug-type Pokémon can also produce it.

name: Sea glass fragments
flavor_text: Pieces of glass that have been polished and buffed by ocean waves. They're used to make glass objects.

name: Seashell
flavor_text: A common seashell found on sandy beaches. This is useful material for building houses

name: Nonburnable garbage
flavor_text: Trash discared here and there. Apparently some Pokémon are big fans of garbage

name: Squishy clay
flavor_text: A soft malleable crafting material used for all sorts of things. It can also be fired and hardened into  bricks

name: Fluff
flavor_text: An irresistibly soft tuft of fluff. Pokémon with the Litter specialty may scatter this

name: Wastepaper
flavor_text: These look tough to craft in their current state. Try recycling them into regular paper

name: Copper ore
flavor_text: Raw mineral copper. When processed into ingots, it can be used as a crafting material

name: Iron ore
flavor_text: Metal that can be obtained from iron deposits. It can also be found among metal debris

name: Gold ore
flavor_text: Metal extracted from gold deposits. It glitters with a luxurious sheen

name: Pokémetal fragment
flavor_text: Colorful, sparkling metal extracted from Pokémetal deposits.

name: Rare Pokémetal fragment
flavor_text: This can sometimes be found in Pokémetal deposits. If you find one, consider yourself extremely lucky!

name: Crystal fragment
flavor_text: A piece of broken crystal. It's transparent, so you can see right through it.

name: Lumber
flavor_text: Wood that's been cut so it's easy to use. If you're making something out of wood, this is for you

name: Brick
flavor_text: Bricks made by baking clay. They're perfect for making buildings, roads and other structures

name: Copper ingot
flavor_text: Copper that has been processed in a smelting furnace. It kinda looks like chocolate...

name: Iron ingot
flavor_text: Iron that has been processed in a smelting furnace. It's really hard and super heavy.

name: Gold ingot
flavor_text: Gold that has been processed in a smelting furnace. Just looking at it makes you feel fancy

name: Pokémetal
flavor_text: Made from smelted Pokémetal fragmants, these can be used to make various items.

name: Rare Pokémetal
flavor_text: Made from smelted rare Pokémetal fragments, these can be used to make various items

name: Glass
flavor_text: You can make glass by melting sand or sandstone in a furnace, or obtain it by smashing broken windos

name: Concrete
flavor_text: Made from a thick liquid that has hardened. This stuff is solid and super sturdy

name: Paper
flavor_text: Pristine white paper made from recycled wastepaper

name: Tinkagear
flavor_text: A cool gear produced by Tinkaton. You can sense their dedication to the craft contained within it

name: Strange strings
flavor_text: These strings make a cool sound when plucked. Use them to make guitars and bass guits.

name: Armor fragment
flavor_text: A piece of shattered armor. Gather all the shards to create armor brimming with emotions

name: Stardust
flavor_text: Sand that can be processed into Star Pieces. It can be found on Dream Islands

name: Red paint
flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

name: Blue paint
flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

name: Green paint
flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

name: Yellow paint
flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

name: Pink paint
flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

name: Cyan paint
flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

name: White paint
flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

name: Black paint
flavor_text: Colorful paint made from crushed berries. A must-have when painting.

name: Leppa Berry
flavor_text: A berry with a rather unremarkable flavor. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Chesto Berry
flavor_text: A rock-hard berry with a dry flavor. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Rawst Berry
flavor_text: The longer and more curled the leaves are, the more bitter this berry tastes. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Aspear Berry
flavor_text: This berry has a distinctively sharp sour taste. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Pecha Berry
flavor_text: A sweet, delicious berry. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Lum Berry
flavor_text: A berry that has a well-balanced flavor. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Bean
flavor_text: Small beans that are jam-packed with nutrients. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Tomato
flavor_text: A round, tasty-looking tomato. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Wheat
flavor_text: They're actually edible raw! Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Potato
flavor_text: A delicious potato-even with the skin still on! Restores some PP when eaten

name: Fresh carrot
flavor_text: You can harvest these spicy carrots by pulling up on their leaves. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Seaweed
flavor_text: Seaweed that has washed ashore. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Cave mushrooms
flavor_text: Mushrooms that grow in damp places such as caves or under shady trees. Restores some PP when eaten

name: Simple salad
flavor_text: An ordinary salad made with leaves. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Leppa salad
flavor_text: A sweet salad made with Leppa Berries. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Seaweed salad
flavor_text: A bitter-tasting salad made with seaweed. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Shredded salad
flavor_text: A sour salad made with finely chopped leaves. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Crushed-berry salad
flavor_text: A salad with a dry flavor, made with crushed Chesto Berries. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Crouton salad
flavor_text: A spicy salad with a delightfully crunchy texture. Powers up Leafage when eaten.

name: Simple soup
flavor_text: An ordinary soup made with Fresh Water. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Seaweed soup
flavor_text: A bitter-tasting soup made with seaweed.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Mushroom soup
flavor_text: A soup with a dry flavor made with mushroom broth.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Electrifying soup
flavor_text: A shockingly spicy soup.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Healthy soup
flavor_text: A spicy soup with an aromatic bean flavor.. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Flavorful soup
flavor_text: A sour soup bursting with flavor. Powers up Water Gun when eaten.

name: Simple bread
flavor_text: Ordinary wheat bread. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Leppa bread
flavor_text: Sour-tasting bread made with Leppa Berry jam.. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Carrot bread
flavor_text: Spicy bread with an intense carrot flavor. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Recycled bread
flavor_text: Bitter-tasting bread made by reusing other bread. Powers up Cut when eaten

name: Fluffy bread
flavor_text: Sweet bread made with Pecha Berries. Powers up cut when eaten.

name: Bread bowl
flavor_text: Spicy bread that's delicious even when burnt. Powers up Cut when eaten.

name: Simple hamburger steak
flavor_text: An ordinary hamburger steak, made with beans. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Mushroom hamburger steak
flavor_text: A hamburger steak with an intensely dry, mushroomy flavor. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Tomato hamburger steak
flavor_text: A hamburger steak that brings out the sour flavor of its ingredients.. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten.

name: Potato hamburger steak
flavor_text: A satisfyingly sweet hamburger steak. Powers up Rock Smash a lot when eaten.

name: Bitter hamburger steak
flavor_text: A bitter-tasting hamberuger steak topped with leaves. Powers up Rock Smash when eaten

name: Vibrant hamburger steak
flavor_text: A hamburger steak made with lots of ingredients. Powers up Rock Smash a lot when eaten

name: Bruised berry
flavor_text: A bruised berry you got from Chef Dente. Restores a bit of PP when eaten

name: Common candy
flavor_text: A piece of candy you got from Chef Dente. Restores some PP when eaten.

name: Rare Candy
flavor_text: A Rare Candy you got from Chef dente. Restores a lot of PP when eaten.

name: Curry and rice
flavor_text: An absolutely essential meal for any party. Enjoy some tasty food alongside other Pokémon!

name: Fresh Water
flavor_text: Delicious water that's perfect for making soup. Drink some and spit it out to make things wet.

name: Soda Pop
flavor_text: Fizzy, sparkling soda. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes seawater

name: Moomoo Milk Coffee
flavor_text: Milky coffee with a comfortingly sweet taste. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes muddy water!

name: Roserade Tea
flavor_text: Tea with a delicate, elegant aroma. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes a hot spring!

name: Chili sauce
flavor_text: Sauce with an enticingly spicy flavor. If you take a sip and spit it out, it becomes lava!

flavor_text: Put this in front of a building, and Pokémon with the Bulldoze specialty will help you relocate it!

name: Bouldery Badge
flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with gray light.

name: Cascade-like Badge
flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with blue light

name: Thunderish Badge
flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with orange light

name: Rainbowish Badge
flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with rainbow light

name: Soul-like Badge
flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with pink light

name: Marshy Badge
flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with golden light

name: Volcanoey Badge
flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with red light

name: Earth Badge
flavor_text: Proof that one has overcome a difficult trial. It sparkles with green light

name: Mysterious Goggles
flavor_text: Goggles with mysterious power. Wearing these allows you to peek into someone's cloud island

name: Storage box
flavor_text: A convenient box you can store items in. It's made of wood and easy to move things in and out of.

name: Wall storage box
flavor_text: It may be small, but it can store lots of stuff. Try mounting it on a wall

name: Big storage box
flavor_text: Roughly three times bigger than your standard storage box. You can put a lot of things inside.

name: Plain chest
flavor_text: A chest with a simple design. It can be used to store items.

name: Office cabinet
flavor_text: Compacy furniture that's surprisingly spacious. Open the sliding door to put items inside

name: Gaming fridge
flavor_text: A chest that's slightly cold to the touch. Ice-type Pokémon will probably enjoy this.

name: Poké Ball Chest
flavor_text: This looks like a giant Poké Ball. It opens wide for you to store things inside

name: Berry case
flavor_text: At a glance, this looks just like a glossy Cheri Berry. It opens wide for you to store things inside

name: Antique chest
flavor_text: Its four curvy legs are adorable. Try putting lots of different things in the draw

name: Plain closet
flavor_text: Open the curtains and store your stuff! You don't actually need the hangers-but they're there anyway!

name: Office locker
flavor_text: A large locker that can even hold clothing. Try storing lots of different things in it!

name: Antique closet
flavor_text: A large bulky closet. Try storing different things in it!

name: Office shelf
flavor_text: This is jam-packed with so many files that it can't hold anything else

name: Polygonal Shelf
flavor_text: A stylish, eye-catching shelf. Looks hard to use but still functions as a shelf just fine,

name: Straw table
flavor_text: Table may be an overly generous description of this big slab of stone atop a pile of hay

name: Log table
flavor_text: With just some cutting and sanding, you can turn logs into a proper table

name: Side table
flavor_text: A side table with a refreshing appearance. It'd be perfect next to a beach chair.

name: Garden table
flavor_text: A stylish table that would look nice with a garden chair or two

name: Wooden table
flavor_text: You only need lumber to make this. Despite its small size, it's still a splendid table

name: Counter
flavor_text: Line up these counters to make them longer. You can also rotate a few to make some nice corners

name: Wall-mounted table
flavor_text: A superb table that can fit snugly in a corner. A row of them would also make a great countertop

name: Pokémon Center counter
flavor_text: Line these up to make a Pokémon Center countertop. They have a simple, clean design

name: Kitchen table
flavor_text: A glossy table that protects against grime. It would look great placed near a sink and stove

name: Push cart
flavor_text: A table cart. Try putting stuff on top of it, like food

name: Exhibition stand
flavor_text: You can place these side by side to adjust the size. Try displaying lots of different things on top!

name: Mysterious pedestal
flavor_text: Looks like it originally had something on top of it...

name: Plain stand
flavor_text: This low table has a simple design and is perfect for displaying items

name: Iron stand
flavor_text: An impressively stury iron stand. Effortlessly supports even heavy items

name: Food counter
flavor_text: A counter that is perfect for putting out food at parties

name: Plain table
flavor_text: This simple table can be placed just about anywhere! Try putting different things on it

name: Antique table
flavor_text: Its lumpy legs are cute. You can make a large table by arranging several of these together

name: Industrial desk
flavor_text: A desk with a beautifuly wood grain texture. This would even look great outside the house.

name: Iron table
flavor_text: Iron-crafted with a simple design. This would work well in any sleekly stylish room

name: Office desk
flavor_text: A desk often used in offices. The pull-out drawer is locked and won't open.

name: Study desk
flavor_text: Just looking at this desk feels like it will somehow make you smarter

name: Cute table
flavor_text: A table with cute lace and frills. It somehow reminds you of Fairy types

name: Iron rack
flavor_text: Decorate your space by putting your favorite things on these stackable shelves!

name: Resort table
flavor_text: This table is made of resilient material and perfectly safe to keep outside, even in rain or a squall.

name: Chic table
flavor_text: A table that would look right at home in a facny restaurant. Perfect for a decadent dinner

name: Pop art table
flavor_text: A shiny, round table. It's as smooth as a Porygon2

name: Poké Ball table
flavor_text: A round table that looks like a Poké Ball. It's large enough to carry lots of stuff.

name: Berry table
flavor_text: A large Aspear Berry table. It looks real enough to make you want to bite into it.

name: Stone table
flavor_text: A table made from stones. It's as hard as an Onix!

name: Luxury table
flavor_text: An extravagant marble table. Setting one down brings elegance to any room.

name: Office table
flavor_text: You can see through the glass surface. If you drop anything underneath it, you'll notice right away

name: Avalugg Table
flavor_text: A solid table with cracks in it. It looks just like a resting Avalugg

name: Straw stool
flavor_text: This is the perfect size for small Pokémon to take a seat!

name: Berry chair
flavor_text: When placed on the ground, it looks just like a buried Leppa Berry. The steam and leaves are a backrest.

name: Simple cushion
flavor_text: A simple practical cusion. It's filled with cotton and provides a soft seat.

name: Log chair
flavor_text: You can sit on this log to take a quick breather. Other Pokémon might stop by to take a break too.

name: Plain stool
flavor_text: A stool with a simple design. Small Pokémon can use this as a seat

name: Resort stool
flavor_text: While this stool looks stiff, the cotton padding inside makes it surprisingly soft

name: Stylish stool
flavor_text: A small, round stool with a stylish three-color cushion.

name: Industrial chair
flavor_text: A perfectly round chair that can easily fit anywhere. Surprisingly sturdy, thanks to its iron legs.

name: Waterproof seat
flavor_text: A smooth waterproof chair. Place it near a bathtub or shower

name: Wooden stool
flavor_text: It's a little chipped but surprisingly sturdyy. Even if a Pokémon sits on it, it won't break. Probably.

name: Iron chair
flavor_text: Though small, this seat is very sturdy. It doesn't look like it would break easily.

name: Public seat
flavor_text: A simple chair without a backrest. Try arranging a bunch of 'em together

name: Soft seat
flavor_text: A cushioned seat that's soft and fluffy-perfect for waiting rooms, relaxation spaces, and the like!

name: Box Sofa
flavor_text: A small square sofa. Line up several of them to make a wide chic sofa

name: Plain chair
flavor_text: This chair is just the right height for eating meals in the dining room

name: Resort chair
flavor_text: A chair perfect for relaxing. Kick back on this to taste a bit of the resort life

name: Chic chair
flavor_text: A luxurious loung chair. Sitting on its soft cushions is absolutely beyond compare!

name: Fancy chair
flavor_text: A high-class chair with a real dignified feel to it. Just sitting here will make you feel important.

name: Antique Chair
flavor_text: A chair with a charming retro design. Its cushions are soft and fluffy

name: Spectator chair
flavor_text: Audience seats like those are found at concert halls or stadiums. Try arranging a bunch of 'em in a row!

name: Luxury chair
flavor_text: A classy-looking seat with a gemstone embedded in it. Just sitting on it makes you feel rich.

name: Garden chair
flavor_text: A chair that would be perfect in a nice garden. Take a seat and enjoy an elegant afternoon.

name: Folding chair
flavor_text: A foldable chair that's simple and easy to carry. Set these up at event venues or similar spaces!

name: Office chair
flavor_text: With a gentle curve to support the body, this chair was designed to help you sit longer without tiring

name: Cute chair
flavor_text: The ruffle skirt is exceptionally cute and lovely

name: Pop art chair
flavor_text: A chair with a soft design and rounded corners. The colors of the backrest and cushion can be changed

name: Gaming chair
flavor_text: With its large backrest and cushions, you could sit comfortable in this chair for a long time.

name: Wooden bench
flavor_text: A long bench that's perfect for taking a break. Pokémon might sit next to each other here.

name: Stone bench
flavor_text: A wide, rock-solid seat. This would make a great park bench

name: Plain sofa
flavor_text: If you see small Pokémon on this sofa, try sitting down next to them

name: Resort sofa
flavor_text: Sitting on this makes you feel like you're in the tropics! Feel free to just laze the day away...

name: Chic sofa
flavor_text: A luxurious high-class sofa. It looks exactly like the ones on the S.S. Anne

name: Antique sofa
flavor_text: A retro sofa with Poké Ball designs here and there

name: Iron bench
flavor_text: A seat made of solid hardened iron. It's sturdy enough to support even the heaviest Pokémon

name: Industrial bench
flavor_text: A simple bench made of wood and iron. The kind you'd expect to find at parks and walking paths.

name: Luxury sofa
flavor_text: This sofa is sooo fluffy. It's like sitting on a cloud

name: Garden bench
flavor_text: A stylish bench with a vine pattern. Put one down to instantly add some flair to an area

name: Cute sofa
flavor_text: A cute, slightly elegant sofa. The backrest is shaped like a Pokémon's wings.

name: Pop art sofa
flavor_text: A soft-looking sofa with cute, rounded edges.

name: Poké Ball Sofa
flavor_text: Experience sitting in an open Poké Ball! Seats two comfortably

name: Pikachu sofa
flavor_text: Pikachu's face is front and center. On the back, you can find a little tail sticking out.

name: Log Bed
flavor_text: A bed made from small logs. You'll sleep soundly enveloped by a woodsy aroma

name: Mini plain bed
flavor_text: A small, plain bed. Great for solo sleepers!

name: Resort bed
flavor_text: A refreshingly cool bed made of woven vines. Lying down on this makes you feel like you're at a resort

name: Iron bed
flavor_text: A slightly narrow bed. It's sturdy enough for a good night's sleep!

name: Deck chair
flavor_text: Lean this chair backa nd relax for a bit. It looks great for sunbating.

name: Beach chair
flavor_text: Lean back and relax in this chair. It pairs perfectly with a beach parasol

name: Straw bed
flavor_text: It's a little itchy, but that doesn't bother Pokémon. They'll snooze away just fine on this.

name: Pop art bed
flavor_text: lying on tthis bed feels like being inside of a pod. It's soft, fluffy, and easy to sleep on.

name: Poké Ball bed
flavor_text: A big bed. Even large Pokémon could sprawl out on it.

name: Berry bed
flavor_text: A large Pecha Berry-themed bed. It's springy texture provides ultimate comfort at bedtime.

name: Wooden Bed
flavor_text: This bed gives any room a mountain lodge aesthetic. You'll sleep soudnly surrounded by the woodsy scent

name: Plain bed
flavor_text: A bed with a simple deisng. It looks like it would mesh with a variety of rooms

name: Resort hammock
flavor_text: The breeze feels so nice when you're lying on this hammock. It's perfect for dozing off!

name: Guest-room bed
flavor_text: A bed with a rather high-class vibe. It looks like it belongs on a luxury ship or in a fancy hotel.

name: Antique bed
flavor_text: This bed has a relaxing, nostalgic atmosphere. The blanket is smooth to the touch

name: Industrial bed
flavor_text: A nice, wide bed that works in any type of room. Even a large Pokémon could sleep in it

name: Luxury bed
flavor_text: An extravagantly crafted bed. It somehow reminds you of a Luxury Ball!

name: Cute bed
flavor_text: You'll feel like royalty sleeping on this cute canopy bed.

name: Gaming bed
flavor_text: A cool, stylish bed. Flip on the power switch to get a cyberspace vibe going

name: Naptime bed
flavor_text: Kick back right on top of Snorlax's belly. It feels so comfy you could snooze through the whole day

name: Wall mirror
flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

name: Large mirror
flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

name: Antique dresser
flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

name: Luxury dresser
flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

name: Cute dresser
flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

name: Wiggly mirror
flavor_text: Look into the mirror to change your transformation and perfect your look!

name: Wooden plate
flavor_text: If you put some food on this plate, Pokémon might stop by to eat.

name: Plate
flavor_text: Dishware made from fired clay. A Pokémon might eat food served on it.

name: Offering dish
flavor_text: Try placing food in this platter as an offering to Mosslax!

name: Party platter
flavor_text: A plate for serving party food. No sneaking a taste before the party starts, though!

name: Picnic basket
flavor_text: Try putting some food inside, and hungry Pokémon might stop by for a bite

name: Mug
flavor_text: A simple, easy-to-use mug. You could change up the colors, and it would still look great.

name: Tea set
flavor_text: Enjoy an elegant teatime with this gorgeous set that includes a teapot and teacups

name: Table setting
flavor_text: This cutlery immediately makes any table look like it belongs in a high-class restaurant

name: Paper Party cups
flavor_text: Paper cups that are easy to carry- perfect for hosting a party!

name: Pizza
flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

name: Fried potatoes
flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

name: Soda float
flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

name: Afternoon tea set
flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

name: Chocolate cookies
flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

name: Sandwiches
flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

name: Shaved ice
flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

name: Ribbon cake
flavor_text: Food loved by one of Eevee's friends. Be sure to prepare a table and chair too!

name: Berry basket
flavor_text: A basket packed with berries. Line up a few to make your very own fruit stand!

name: Small vase
flavor_text: A vase with a single cute flower inside. Put it anywhere to add a splash of color to your life

name: Leafy plant
flavor_text: A plant with glossy leaves. It's actually related to the taro root

name: Pitcher-plant pot
flavor_text: A flower vase with a pink lip that resembles a Pokémon's mouth. It emanates a faintly sweet aroma

name: Extravagant flowers
flavor_text: With robust orange flowers in full bloom, using this decoration is sure to add some color to an area

name: Tall potted plant
flavor_text: A small, thin palm tree. It comes in a planter so it won't make a mess even if it's placed indoors

name: Flat-leaf plant
flavor_text: A plant with flat leaves that look like planks. It's actually a type of succulent

name: Twisted potted plant
flavor_text: A plant with a winding, twisted trunk. It doesn't look like it will get any bigger than it already is.

name: Small garbage can
flavor_text: A simple, colorful trash can, perfect for indoor use

name: Munna bank
flavor_text: An especially heavy money box. It feels like it's full of coins

name: Pencil holder
flavor_text: A pencil holder with lots of poencils in it. Try putting this on top of a study desk

name: Fancy pen
flavor_text: A high-class ballpoint pen that exudes luxury. A very important person could have used this

name: Letter
flavor_text: A simple sealed letter. It has a Poké Ball stamp on it

name: Notepad
flavor_text: It's full of important-looking notes, so there's no space to write anything else!

name: Book
flavor_text: A thick hardcover book. The pages inside were written in small print

name: Open Book
flavor_text: A classic hardcover book. It's probably got a lot of difficult words inside

name: Book pile
flavor_text: A pile of upturned books with torn-out pages. They look like they fell off from a bookshelf

name: Papers
flavor_text: Lots of tiny words are written on the white pages along with drawings of colorful shapes

name: Newspaper
flavor_text: Its pages are filled with small, tightly-packed letters. What could be written here?

name: Photo frame
flavor_text: You can put one of your photos in this frame and place it on a table or stand

name: Wall photo frame
flavor_text: You can put one of your photos in this frame and hang it on a wall.

name: Corkboard
flavor_text: Choose one of your favorite photos to hang on this corkboard!

name: CD rack
flavor_text: A rack with CDs on it. Sure to appeal to music lovers

name: Magazine rack
flavor_text: This stand has a great selection of weekly magazines and photo books.

name: Mini bookcase
flavor_text: A small bookcase packed with books. It's tiny enough to fit in tight spaces!

name: Bookcase
flavor_text: Furniture with colorful books arranged on the shelves. It looks like there's room for even MORE books!

name: Stone fireplace
flavor_text: A huge fireplace. Light this up to make a space feel warm and cozy

name: Dining cabinet
flavor_text: A cupboard packed full of plates, cups-even a tea set

name: Modern sink
flavor_text: A state-of-the-art sink that even has a drain. Turn the handle to make water flow out

name: Cooking stove
flavor_text: A simple stylish stove. Turn the dial and flames will shoot right out of it

name: Microwave oven
flavor_text: This lights up when powered on, but it doesn't seem like it can heat anything...

name: Refrigerator
flavor_text: It emits a slight chill, but it doesn't seem like it can keep anything cold

name: Fan
flavor_text: Power on this fan to make it swivel. Pokémon might stop by to watch it move

name: Air conditioner
flavor_text: A state-of-the-art air conditioner. Press once for cold air, or press twice for hot

name: Printer
flavor_text: A large printer used by businesses. Perfect for an office or other workspaces!

name: Washing machine
flavor_text: While this does make noise when powered on, it doesn't seem to actually wash clothes...

name: Toilet
flavor_text: Lift the cover and sit on the toilet for as long as you like

name: Sink
flavor_text: A stylish sink on a wooden stand. Turn on the faucet to make water pour out.

name: Towel rack
flavor_text: A simple wall rack with a towel hanging on it. This would look great next to a sink

name: Bathtime set
flavor_text: Shampoo, towels and a toy-everything you need to make bath time a blast!

name: Cleaning supplies
flavor_text: Detergent, a dust cloth, and a Mareep sponge are all you need to become a cleaning master!

name: Shower
flavor_text: A shower with a simple design. Place it next to a bathtub to make your bathroom complete

name: Bathtub
flavor_text: A bathtub with a simple design. Fill it up with water to enjoy a nice soak

name: Bouncy blue bathtub
flavor_text: A bathtub that lets you experience waves and bubbles, even without a single drop of water inside.

name: Tablet
flavor_text: A convenient, easy-to-carry computer. It's got a hard case so no worries if you drop it!

name: Cell phone
flavor_text: A device carefully protected inside a hard case. It can't make calls, even when powered on

name: Laptop
flavor_text: A sleek, easy-to-carry laptop. Try displaying some photos on the monitor.

name: Computer
flavor_text: A computer that looks like it belongs in a laboratory. Some notes have been stuck to it here and there

name: Gaming PC
flavor_text: A PC rig that even includes a headset. The monitor can display photos when powered on

name: Television
flavor_text: A large television that can be easily viewed from far away. It's a flatscreen, so carrying it is easy-peasy.

name: Wall monitor
flavor_text: A monitor that emits blue light when powered on. Try displaying your photographs on it

name: Arcade machine
flavor_text: A game machine from a facility somewhere. It looks brand-new, so it probably can still be turned on

name: Alarm Clock
flavor_text: A loud noise rings out when you press this. Be careful! You might accidentally wake someone up

name: Toy blocks
flavor_text: Stacking toys that are fun to play with. Discover all the different combinations you can make!

name: Pinwheels
flavor_text: Pokémon like to spin these round and round. Wind-producing Pokémon especially like them!

name: Knitting supplies
flavor_text: Tools for knitting hats, sweaters and the like. Pokémon are captivated by the round balls of yarn

name: Game Boy system
flavor_text: A very sturdy-looking game console. It's old but it still seems to start up

name: Humidifier
flavor_text: A humidifier with a  distinct round shape. Turn it on to increase the humidity level nearby.

name: Funky diffuser
flavor_text: The symbol on it looks dangerous, but it doesn't seem like this will actually spew out poison gas...

name: First aid kit
flavor_text: A box with lots of medicines and supplies for treating injuries

name: Crystal ball
flavor_text: A large crystal ball used for fortune-telling. Give it to a Psychic-type Pokémon and see what happens

name: Microscope
flavor_text: A microscope often found in chemistry labs and research institutions. Essential for experiments!

name: Science experiment
flavor_text: Chemicals, testing equipment, and a clipboard... OK! The experiment is ready to begin!

name: Jumbled cords
flavor_text: These cords are all tangled up and cannot be separated

name: CD player
flavor_text: A device that plays music. If you find a CD, try putting it inside

name: Tabletop mic
flavor_text: A microphone like those used at recording studios or public speeches. Try putting it on a desk!

name: Standing mic
flavor_text: A microphone meant for the stage. Standing before it makes you want to burst into song

name: Big drum
flavor_text: A very impessive drum. Beat it to produce a loud, invigorating da-a-DUM!

name: Cool electric guitar
flavor_text: A snazzy guitat strung with strange strings. Holding it would make you feel pretty amped...

name: Cool bass guitar
flavor_text: A snazzy bass guitar strung with strange strings. Holding it would make you feel pretty low-key...

name: Audio mixer
flavor_text: Plug it in and switch on the screen. DJ Ditto is in the house!

name: Speaker
flavor_text: Putting this next to a stage or an audio mixer ought to create an electrifying atmosphere!

name: Gold Teeth
flavor_text: Their lustrous golden shine hasn't changed at all. Maybe someone dropped them long ago?

name: Repel
flavor_text: When you press the spray cap, a weird scent spritzes out and permeates the area

name: Big Nugget
flavor_text: It's made of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. It seems like it was popular among enthusiasts.

name: Balloons
flavor_text: Balloons of many vibrant colors. They sway back and forth even in the most gentle of breezes

name: Punching game
flavor_text: Slug this machine real good with your first, and it'll tell you how strong your punch is

name: Boo-in-the-box
flavor_text: Open the box, and -BOING!-out pops the Gengar!

name: Wobbuffet Wobbler
flavor_text: An exceptionally durable Wobbuffet doll. It gets back up no matter how many times you knock it over.

name: Step stool
flavor_text: A step stool for reaching things in high places. Try climbing on top of it.

name: Cardboard boxes
flavor_text: Light cardboard boxes. It doesn't look like they have anything inside

name: Whiteboard
flavor_text: A whiteboard covered in writing and sticky notes that looks like it belongs in a lab

name: Control unit
flavor_text: This has a bunch of switches, but it doesn't look like any of them do anything

name: Auspicious Armor
flavor_text: Heavy armor recreated from armor fragments. Auspicious wishes live within it

name: Malicious Armor
flavor_text: Heavy armor recreated from armor fragments. Malicious will lurks within it

name: Clear Bell
flavor_text: A very-old fashioned bell that makes a gentle ringing sound. Ring it in an open space to call Ho-Oh

name: Tidal Bell
flavor_text: A very-old fashioned bell that makes a gentle ringing sound. Ring it in an open space to call Lugia

name: Ship's Wheel
flavor_text: A wheel used to steer a ship. It spinds round and round when you touch it!

name: Mysterious statue
flavor_text: Doesn't seem like anyone knows exactly what this is a statue of...

name: Fiery Magby statue
flavor_text: If you place a switch nearby and activate it, Magby will shoot fire out of their mouth! Fwooosh!

name: Gym emblem statue
flavor_text: This stone statue makes you feel pumped up. Would look great on a pedestal

name: Spacesuit
flavor_text: Clothing designed for living in outer space. Keeps the wearer safe even in an airless environment

name: Model space shuttle
flavor_text: A realistic model that looks like it could blast off at any second. Could it have been in some museum?

name: Spaceship
flavor_text: a vehicle meant for traveling to outerspace. Hermetically sealed so air doesn't escape.

name: Wall Calendar
flavor_text: A calendar that's simple and easy to use. It meshes well with pretty much any wall.

name: Wreath
flavor_text: A simple wreath crafted from branches and leaves. It'd look nice and elegant on a wall

name: Decorative bookshelf
flavor_text: A decorative shelf with colorful books on it. Perfect for livening up any wall!

name: Decorative storage shelf
flavor_text: A decorative shelf lined with ceramic bottles. Attach it to a wall to liven up any space!

name: Decorative plant shelf
flavor_text: A long vine droops from the potted plant on this decorative shelf. Perfect for livening up any wall!

name: Antique clock
flavor_text: This clock ticks away the hours. It lets out a loud bong at designated times

name: Berry clock
flavor_text: A clock that resembles an Oran Berry cross section. Try mounting it on a wall

name: Rowlet clock
flavor_text: A wall clock shaped like a small house. Rowlet will pop out to let you know what time it is

name: Hanging banner
flavor_text: Cloth you might find on a department store's wall. Stack several to make 'em even longer

name: Party bunting
flavor_text: These make perfect party decorations. Hang a bunch to create a festive mood!

name: Vine wall decoration
flavor_text: With just a few leaves and vine ropes, you can make a stylish wall decoration

name: Berry wall decoration
flavor_text: The six swaying berries look incredibly tasty. Alas, they're inedible

name: Hanging scroll
flavor_text: A scrol with phenomenal brushwork. Hang it on a wall to create a solemn atmosphere

name: Ceiling fan
flavor_text: Its blades spin round and round when powered on. Great for when you want to circulate air!

name: Castform weather charm
flavor_text: A reversible Castform doll. Rumor has it, when the doll changes form, the weather changes too!

name: Eevee doll
flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

name: Pikachu doll
flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

name: Clefairy doll
flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

name: Arcanine doll
flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

name: Dragonite doll
flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

name: Ditto doll
flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

name: Substitute doll
flavor_text: If you set this down and inspect it, Drifloon may fly over and whisk you away to a Dream Island

name: Grubby letter
flavor_text: A yellowed letter, still sealed. It's got a postage stamp with a Poké Ball pattern on it.

name: Grubby notepad
flavor_text: It looks like there's some pretty important stuff written on this, but it's a little grimy

name: Grubby papers
flavor_text: Lots of tiny words are written on the yellowed pages along with drawings of colorful shapess.

name: Grubby newspaper
flavor_text: A newspaper with noticeable dirt and grime. It smells like old paper

name: Grubby tablet
flavor_text: A convenient, easy-to-carry deivce. Even though it's inside a hard case, the screen is cracked

name: Grubby cell phone
flavor_text: A device with a cracked screen. It can't make any calls, even when powered on.

name: Campfire
flavor_text: A campfire made from gathered sticks. When lit, it illuminates the area with a warm light.

name: Torch
flavor_text: If you light this, it'll burn slowly, filling the area with bright light

name: Slender candle
flavor_text: Light this up to get a flickering bright-red flame. It's small enough to fit on a desk

name: Eerie candle
flavor_text: Fwoosh! This candle glows with a bluish flame when lit. It's small enough to fit on top of a desk.

name: Wall torch
flavor_text: A simple light that looks appropriate even on rugged surfaces such as caves and rock walls

name: Firepit
flavor_text: Set this ablaze to illuminate the surroundings with bright light. Fwoosh!

name: Bonfire
flavor_text: When the wood in the center catches fire, this provides warmth and light to a large nearby area

name: Sandbox
flavor_text: Place this to set up a fun space for playing with sand. Discover what you can create here!

name: Tire toy
flavor_text: Tires used in parks as playground equipment. Put them on the ground and have fun hopping over them!

name: Concrete pipe
flavor_text: Link several of these to make the pipe as long as you want! The inside is pitch black

name: Punching bag
flavor_text: Heavy and packed full of sand. Perfect for practicing punches and kicks!

name: Slide
flavor_text: An essential part of any playground. Its imposing size leaves a real impression

name: Vending machine
flavor_text: Connect this to electricity to make it light up! Looks like it still has some things inside for sale.

name: Wall-mounted flowers
flavor_text: A planter with colorful flowers. Hang one on a wall to create a vibrant space.

name: Chansey plant
flavor_text: A tree that looks just like a Chansey! Looking at it seems to fill you with a gentle energy

name: Garden ornament
flavor_text: This decoration looks like Maushold spending quality time on a log.

name: Bike
flavor_text: A cool bicycle that looks high-end. It sparkles as if it's brand-new

name: Planter
flavor_text: Plant some flower or vegetable seeds here, and raise them until they're fully grown.

name: Garden flowers
flavor_text: A styish flower pot with cute flowers in full bloom. It would look great as a desk ornament

name: Cart
flavor_text: It has a large bed, so it looks like you can use it to haul some pretty big stuff.

name: Perch
flavor_text: A branch perch where bird Pokémon can rest. Place a few and you might get some visitors.

name: Wooden birdhouse
flavor_text: A birdhouse filled with dry, soft grass. Bird Pokémon would probably love lounging here.

name: Mailbox
flavor_text: A box for receiving letters. It'd look really nice in front of a house!

name: Weather vane
flavor_text: A decoration that spins around and around in the wind. Looks like a bird Pokémon perched on a post.

name: Gravestone
flavor_text: A place where souls can rest in peace. Ghost-type Pokémon might enjoy this

name: Blank canvas
flavor_text: A completely empty canvas. A Pokémon artist might be inspired to paint something on it.

name: Painting (landscape)
flavor_text: One of Smearguru's passion prjects. The contrast betwee the forest and the mountain is beautiful

name: Painting (portrait)
flavor_text: One of Smearguru's passion projects. The subject has been masterfully recreated, wobbliness and all.

name: Painting (still life)
flavor_text: One of Smearguru's passion projects. Each and every object looks just like the real thing

name: Cannon
flavor_text: Put fireworks or a Pokémon with the Explode specialty inside, light the fuse, and watch 'em fly!

name: Bell
flavor_text: A golden, wall-mounted bell. When struck, it rings with a pleasant sound.

name: Small stage
flavor_text: Get on and start dancing! You can power on the lights by hooking this up to electricity

name: Hot-spring spout
flavor_text: Place this next to a pool of hot water to create a genuine hot-spring vibe

name: Water basin
flavor_text: Fill this with water so Pokémon can do some watering for you

name: Canoe
flavor_text: A paddle, bucket and rope is all you need for a journey out to sea

name: Inflatable boat
flavor_text: Feels great whether you lie down on it like a bed, or float it on the water like a boat.

name: Beach parasol
flavor_text: Place one of these on the beach for protection from scorching sunbeams

name: Horsea fountain
flavor_text: Installing this near water should raise the humidity of its surroundings

name: Fishing rod
flavor_text: A must-have item for fishing up Pokémon. Set one by the water and wait patiently for a bite!

name: Arrow sign
flavor_text: An arrow-shaped sign. You could use it as a guidepost at forked roads

name: Menu board
flavor_text: Specials are written on this board, but it doesn't seem like Pokémon can actually read them.

name: Sign
flavor_text: A sign made out of wood. There's an important message witten on it... Probably!

name: Signpost
flavor_text: A sign that looks like it belongs at a bus stop. It could serve as a guiding landmark in cities or on roads!

name: Information board
flavor_text: A sign with information about the town written on it. Nobody knows what town it's for, though.

name: Raichu sign
flavor_text: A sign depicting Raichu discharging electricity. When powered up, the neon lighting glows brightly

name: Photo cutout board
flavor_text: Put your fac through the hole to become Plusle or Minun!

name: Worn wooden crate
flavor_text: A sturdy but somewhat shabby box. Stack a bunch of them to create a warehouse vibe.

name: Wooden crate
flavor_text: You have absolutely no idea how to open this box...But you can put stuff on top of it at least!

name: Barrel
flavor_text: It's totally empty inside. You could put something on top to make it look nice

name: Garbage bags
flavor_text: Trash bags found most anywhere. Certain Pokémon find their odor irresistible

name: Garbage bin
flavor_text: This trash can is big enough that a Pokémon could probably fit inside!

name: Recycling bin
flavor_text: A bin for disposing of empty cans. It's just big enough for a Pokémon to fit inside

name: Grubby rags
flavor_text: A piece of tattered cloth unsuitable for processing. Cut it up to obtain twine.

name: Nonburnable garbage (outdoor)
flavor_text: Obtained through a special method, thwese can be placed just as they are now

name: Traffic cone
flavor_text: When lined up, the cones are connected by barrier poles. Great for construction zones!

name: Sewer-hole cover
flavor_text: A sewer-hole cover that opens like a door. It can serve as an entrance  if you put it on top of a hole

name: Fire hydrant
flavor_text: This device spews water for putting out fires, but you're not really sure how to use it,...

name: Sandbags
flavor_text: A cloth sack filled with dirt and sand. It's pretty bulky and looks heavy

name: Excavation tools
flavor_text: A sturdy-looking pickax and shovel. They're wasted on any Pokémon who can already dig, though.

name: Tires
flavor_text: This tire stack looks like it could collapse at any moment, but oddly enough it stays upright

name: Metal drum
flavor_text: A smooth, clean canister. It's empty, so it's actually quite light

name: Construction supplies
flavor_text: Construction tools stored in a meta drum. Great for factories or warehouses.

name: Iron pipes
flavor_text: A pile of iron pipes that looks like it belongs at a construction site

name: Wheelbarrow
flavor_text: A wheelbarrow carrying a large mound of dirt. A lot of construction sites probably have these!

name: Large ventilation fan
flavor_text: A huge, flat ventilation fan-the kind you'd find on top of a building or a house.

name: Heat Rock
flavor_text: A mysterious rock that radiates heat. Place it to raise the temperature around it.

name: Icy Rock
flavor_text: A mysterious rock that radiates cold. Place it to lower the temperature around it.

name: Smooth Rock
flavor_text: A mysterious rock that feels smooth. Place it to lower the humidity of the surrounding area.

name: Damp Rock
flavor_text: A mysterious rock that feels damp. Place it to raise the humidity of the surrounding area.

name: Ditto Flag
flavor_text: A flag that marks Ditto's house. Place it on a house you want to live in.

name: Workbench
flavor_text: Try gathering lots of materials and making a variety of different things here!

name: Community Box
flavor_text: Pokémon can deposit items they've stumbled upon into this box or take items out to process them

name: Frame
flavor_text: A frame for hanging an item on a wall. Try putting different things inside!

name: Cutting board
flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making salads. Grab some ingredients and make something tasty!

name: Frying pan
flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making hamburger steak. Put this on a stove or campfire

name: Stylish frying pan
flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making hamburger steak. Put this on a stove or campfire

name: Cooking pot
flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making soup. Put this on a stove or campfire

name: Stylish cooking pot
flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for making soup. Put this on a stove or campfire

name: Bread oven
flavor_text: Kitchen equipment for baking bread. Have a Pokémon light the fire for you.

name: Smelting furnace
flavor_text: A furnace for processing ore into metals. Get a Pokémon with the Burn specialty to help you out

name: Metallic smelting furnace
flavor_text: A high-performance metallic furnace that can quickly process metals and other ingredients

name: Concrete mixer
flavor_text: A Pokémon with the Crush specialty can use this to make concrete out of water and stone

name: Railway track
flavor_text: Lay down tracks to create a railway, then ride a handcar to get where you're going in a jiffy!

name: Crossing gate
flavor_text: With its characteristic black-and-yellow lines, this can be used to designate loading zones for a handcard

name: Handcar
flavor_text: These carts clang along atop railway tracks. You can even link a bunch of carts together

name: Elevator platform
flavor_text: You can make a functional elevator by using ladders to vertically connect two elevator platforms

name: Lift platform
flavor_text: Place two of these with enough distance between them to create an automatic transport system

name: Cash register
flavor_text: Place this on a table and power it on, and Pokémon will come by to conduct trades!

name: Sprinkler
flavor_text: An irrigation device that sprays water in a wide area. Try putting one near the waterside

name: Mini floodgate
flavor_text: Turn the handle on top to start or stop the flow of water

name: Utility pole
flavor_text: Use these to connect electrical generators to machines and send electricity over long distances.

name: Wireless power-transmitter switch
flavor_text: Connect these to electrical generators to use them. Put a switch nearby to quickly turn things on or off

name: Wireless power transmitter
flavor_text: Use these to connect electrical generators to machines and send electricity over long distances.

name: Mini generator
flavor_text: Place this anywhere, and it will generate electricity all on its own. What a remarkable machine!

name: Floor switch
flavor_text: A ground-mounted switch that activates nearby machinery when it detects weight

name: Wall switch
flavor_text: A switch that would look perfect installed on a house wall. Press it to activate nearby devices

name: Card reader
flavor_text: A machine that reads key cards or Pokédexes. Mount it to a wall.

name: Laser sensor
flavor_text: When this sensor detects movement, it activates devices nearby

name: Security camera
flavor_text: A camera that watches over its surroundings. Place one anywhere you want to keep an eye on

name: Mushroom streetlight
flavor_text: Darkness poses no problem when you've got a gentle mushroom glow.

name: Town streetlight
flavor_text: Power this with electricity to illuminate the area with gentle light

name: Harbor streetlight
flavor_text: A streetlight that invokes harbor vibes. The life buoy stands out as the main highlight.

name: Chic streetlight
flavor_text: When powered on, this light emits a gentle glow that faintly illuminates its surroundings

name: Double streetlight
flavor_text: When pwoered on, both lamps shine brightly to illuminate their surroundings

name: Mushroom lamp
flavor_text: The mushroom emits a gentle glow, illuminating the surroundings with soft light

name: Plain lamp
flavor_text: Powering this on illuminates the surroundings with warm light

name: Desk light
flavor_text: A light with a simple design. Perfect for brightening up your desk when you need to focus on work.

name: Poké Ball light
flavor_text: A neon light that glows red and white when powered on. It would look great on top of a table

name: Berry table lamp

name: Moss
flavor_text: This plant can grow anywhere dim and damp-even on boulders

name: Fern
flavor_text: An unusual plant that can grow in coarse volcanic ash or bumpy igneous boulders

name: Leppa tree
flavor_text: A tree that grows Leppa Berries. Berries that fall from its branches are sure to grow back after a while

name: Large palm tree
flavor_text: A large tree that grows by the seaside. Its shape looks just like an Exeggutor

name: Pointy tree
flavor_text: These pointy trees grow in all sorts of different places. They look pretty prickly

name: Wildflowers
flavor_text: Beautiful flowers blooming on fresh dirt. Looking at them seems to soothe the mind

name: Seashore flowers
flavor_text: The symbol of a port town. Looking at these seems to refresh you.

name: Mountain flowers
flavor_text: Flowers that bloom elegantly, even in rugged, rocky environments. They are sublimely beautiful.

name: Skyland flowers
flavor_text: Puffy flowers often found at the skylands. Their blossoms are cute and ethereal.

name: Beautiful flower
flavor_text: Gorgeous and extravagant flowers in full bloom. Be wary of the thorns on their stems

name: Cute flower
flavor_text: Cute flowers that bloom in port towns. They would surely be a delightful gift to any Pokémon

name: Elegant flower
flavor_text: Flowers that stand tall, even in rugged mountains. Their majestic elegance fills your heart with resolve

name: Robust flower
flavor_text: Flowers resolutely blooming toward the sky. Looking at them seems to fill you with energy.

name: Adorable hedge
flavor_text: A round hedge often seen in wide-open fields. Cute flowers are blooming on it

name: Healthy hedge
flavor_text: A hedge that has grown tall in the sunshine. Looking at it seems to fill you with vigor.

name: Damp hedge
flavor_text: A hedge with lustrous flowers blooming on it. It might be even more beautiful on a rainy day.

name: Stylish hedge
flavor_text: With petals blooming one atop the other, this fluffy hedge looks just like Mareep wall

name: Square plant
flavor_text: A bush that has grown thick, dense leaves. You can make a hedge by joining a few of these together

name: Leppa tree stump
flavor_text: A stump left behind after cutting down a Leppa tree. It looks like it would make a great seat

name: Palm tree stump
flavor_text: Sit on this stump, gaze out at the sea, and enjoy total relaxation.

name: Pointy tree stump
flavor_text: The remains of a felled pointy tree. The stump itself is round and not pointy at all

name: Driftwood
flavor_text: The remains of a tree that washed ashore. It would look great as a piece of interior décor

name: Sticky web
flavor_text: A web that clings to walls or rocks. If you get tangled in it, you might have a hard time moving

name: Large boulder
flavor_text: A large, heavy boulder. Looks like even hardened fists couldn't break this.

name: Mossy boulder
flavor_text: The dense moss clinging to it can't be peeled off

name: Molten rock
flavor_text: Lava that's cooling and ahrdening. Pour water on it to instantly harden it.

name: Cooled molten rock
flavor_text: Molten rock that has been cooled with water. Heat it up again by placing it near lava!

name: Stalagmites
flavor_text: Mineral formations that jut from the ground in limestone caverns. They look like big Pokémon fangs!

name: Stalactites
flavor_text: Dissolved limestone that has rehardened. These hang from the ceilings of limestone caverns

name: Icicle
flavor_text: Formed when moisture on the ceiling freezes into ice. Place these to cool the surrounding area.

name: Crystal cluster
flavor_text: Gemstones that brightly sparkle in caves. Shatter one and use the pieces to make something!

name: Strength rock
flavor_text: Though this boulder is incredibly big, it looks like you could use Strength to push it.

name: Dowsing Machine
flavor_text: Partner up with a Pokémon skilled at searching and use this to find hidden treasures.

name: Neo Dowsing Machine
flavor_text: The upgraded Dowsing Machine! It can now find a special location.

name: Party Popper
flavor_text: Celebrate with a loud pop and some confetti! But be careful-you can only use each one once

name: Star Piece
flavor_text: Apparently, if you give this to a Pokémon visiting from far away, they'll give you a gift in return
